chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1469 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of CMA No.6188/2023 (Stay App) 3. For hearing of main case 06.12.2023 Mr. Zafar Ali Shah, Advocate for petitioner. Syed Tanveer Abbas Shah, Advocate for respondents-SEPCO along with Raheem Bakhsh, SDO SEPCO, Rohri. Mr. Nisar Ahmed G. Abro, Deputy Attorney General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel for respondents-SEPCO has filed a statement stating that electricity connection of the petitioner has already been restored. In view of above, learned Counsel for petitioner submits that grievance of the petitioner has been redressed, and he does not press this petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
